title: Back-office AI is moving offline
body: Anchr, Polimorphic, and CVector show AI moving into food distribution, government services, and industrial facilities, where workflows are specific and budgeted.

title: Specific buyers still beat broad tools
body: Polimorphic, Auctor, and DualEntry target buyers with defined budgets and painful implementation work, not broad AI tooling.

title: Workflow-first beats chat-first
body: Tapestry, FLORA, and Jimini Health wrap AI around repeated behavior: social graphs, creative production, and care delivery.
